title: Assistant Store Manager - Om Book Shop - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Om Book Shop - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Assistant Store Manager with drive and ambition, Om Book Shop in Bhubaneswar is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Om Book Shop:
Om Book Shop is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Om Book Shop!
